ConnectOne Power API
Preface
This guide provides specifications of the HTTP/XML based API provided by ConnectOne for the
automated sending of SMS via the Internet. This guide is intended for developers planning on
integrating their systems with ConnectOne’s SMS service.
A Few Assumptions
This guide assumes that you are familiar with and have experience applying the following
technologies and concepts:
 HTTP/HTTPS communications using the GET and POST methods for parameter passing
 A programming language such as Java, C/C++, Visual Basic or PHP
